heading: Sheep production and marketing grant program

children.text: the development of innovative approaches to solve long-term needs.

children.heading: Eligibility
children.label: b Eligibility
children.text: The Secretary shall make grants under this section to at least one national entity, the mission of which is consistent with the purpose of the grant program.

children.heading: Funding
children.label: c Funding
children.text: Of the funds of the Commodity Credit Corporation, the Secretary shall use to carry out this section $2,000,000 for fiscal year 2019, $400,000 for fiscal year 2024, and $3,000,000 for fiscal year 2026, to remain available until expended.
